step_by_step_thinking: I agree with using chlorine-based compounds primarily because they not only clean but also provide strong disinfection against pathogens that might be present in blood spills. However, it’s important to note that while effective, these chemicals can pose skin irritation risks if used improperly; thus proper handling protocols must always accompany their use.
raw_response:
I agree with using chlorine-based compounds primarily because they not only clean but also provide strong disinfection against pathogens that might be present in blood spills. However, it’s important to note that while effective, these chemicals can pose skin irritation risks if used improperly; thus proper handling protocols must always accompany their use.


Answer: C
